forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 37. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 67. Southwest wind 9 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph.

weather_report:
As the early morning stretches into the wake of a new day, Boston rests quietly, cloaked in an embrace of stillness, the predominant hues of twilight deepening softly into shades of night. The air feels cool, around the low 37 degrees, with a gentle stir of the southwest wind whispering through the streets. As the hours glide by, anticipation builds for a transformation, where sunlight will soon grace the city and brighten the horizon.

When Friday dawns in all its glory, expect a radiant sun ushering in warmth, with temperatures climbing to a delightful near 67 degrees. The winds, joyful in their dance, will flourish between 9 to 17 mph, lending a fresh energy to the day, marked by gusts that might playfully tousle your hair. Such promising conditions invite revellers outdoors—perhaps a stroll along the Charles River to witness the first blossoms of spring, or gathering with friends at a cozy café to savor a warm cup of coffee together. Dressing in layers will serve you well; a light jacket should suffice against the lingering coolness of morning while allowing for the ease of shedding it as the day unfolds into a blissful sunlit afternoon. 

In this moment of transition, enchanting and tranquil, Boston offers a canvas of delightful possibilities, urging one to step outside and breathe deeply the invigorating air of spring.
